commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a KaTeX dependency, imports KaTeX CSS, adds math extraction/restoration around the shared Control UI markdown renderer, and adds markdown tests for inline and display math.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main routes chat through toSanitizedMarkdownHtml and has no math-rendering stage, while PR-head blockers are visible because deleted helper definitions are still called.
